strengths: TypeScript and Node.js experience aligns with the required stack
PostgreSQL/SQL and REST/web architecture knowledge present in background
Fullstack exposure across web, mobile, and infrastructure
concerns: Massive seniority mismatch — Staff/Senior engineer applying for an entry-level junior role suggests poor fit, likely flight risk and salary misalignment
No demonstrable React or Nest.js experience listed; frontend work skews toward Ember.js which is not in the required stack
German only at Basic level despite role requiring high on-site presence in a German renewable-energy/construction context where client/contractor communication likely demands fluency

key_factors.factor: Limited German for on-site construction-sector role

response.justification: The candidate is a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level junior position — a fundamental mismatch that signals retention risk, compensation conflict, and likely disengagement with junior-scoped work. The resume shows no concrete React or Nest.js delivery (frontend history centers on Ember.js), and there is no evidence of renewable-energy, construction-tech, or CRM/document-management domain exposure. Only basic German further weakens fit for a role demanding high on-site presence in a German-speaking consulting and contractor environment.
